subject: kaiser us/uk setoff w/mg and ena

emails.subject: Re: Kaiser US/UK Setoff w/MG and ENA
emails.subject_base: Kaiser US/UK Setoff w/MG and ENA
emails.body: Re: Kaiser US/UK Setoff w/MG and ENA Tracy: Where does EPMI fit in if we are doing a financial power swap? Who are the Enron entities that are involved and what contracts are currently in place with the Kaiser entities? Are we netting overall exposures and using one collateral threshold? Are we cross defaulting all of the contracts? What exactly do you want to accomplish with the netting agreement? Carol St. Clair EB 3889 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax) carol.st.clair@enron.com Tracy Ngo/ENRON@enronXgate 05/23/2001 06:17 PM

emails.subject: RE: Kaiser US/UK Setoff w/MG and ENA
emails.subject_base: Kaiser US/UK Setoff w/MG and ENA
emails.body: RE: Kaiser US/UK Setoff w/MG and ENA It's actually with ENA, not EPMI. Sorry for the confusion. -Tracy
